section.heading: Authorization of appropriations

subsection.heading: Authorization of appropriations
subsection.chapeau: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this part—

paragraph.content: the sum of $10,000,000 for the fiscal year ending on September 30, 1981; and

the sum equal to $10,000,000 minus the amount appropriated for the fiscal year ending on September 30, 1981, under the authorization contained in this section, for the fiscal year ending on September 30, 1982.

content.p: Any funds appropriated under the authorization contained in this section shall remain available until expended.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 95–619, title II, § 270, as added Pub. L. 96–294, title V, § 562, June 30, 1980, 94 Stat. 751.)
